why_they_bought: Retired a patchwork of spreadsheets and a regional compliance-reporting tool years ago; the existing 'Feature request: custom compliance report template' case is this account asking FleetOps to extend Compliance Center further, not a problem with it.
legacy_system: a patchwork of spreadsheets and a regional compliance-reporting tool
success_criteria: Exemplary adoption across the richest capability set of any arc account (Live Map, Route Optimizer, Insights Hub, Compliance Center, Fuel Analytics)
